name: sounds-like-skill-issue
description: Michael Yau's personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: starter
plugins.description: Starter plugin — example skill, command, and hook scaffolding

plugins.name: outsource
plugins.description: Jira ticket URL → review-ready PR (worktree, branch, impl, tests, gh pr create)

plugins.name: deskill-me
plugins.description: Install or update every plugin in this marketplace in one go (/deskill-me)

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Summarize a PR as Problem → Solution → Breaking changes, pulling Jira context when the PR references a ticket
